findings.title: Below-Target Accuracy
findings.recommendation: Consider hyperparameter tuning, more training data, or ensembling.

findings.title: Weak Discrimination (AUC < 0.70)
findings.recommendation: Investigate feature importance, add informative features.

findings.title: Disparate False Positive Rate
findings.description: FPR gap of 22.5% across groups ['Black', 'White']. Group 'Black' has highest FPR=42.3%. This group is disproportionately flagged incorrectly.
findings.recommendation: Apply post-processing threshold adjustment per group, or use adversarial debiasing during training.

findings.title: Model Improvement Not Statistically Significant
findings.description: McNemar's test p=0.2670 — difference between models is NOT significant.
findings.recommendation: Do not deploy new model based on this result alone. Collect more test data.

findings.title: Non-Significant Result
findings.recommendation: Consider collecting more data or revisiting hypothesis formulation.
